suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit exception or guidance in mors-global-worker skill for pure refactor/infrastructure tasks: strict red/green TDD (failing-test-first) is not applicable when the change has no behavioral delta. Workers should document why TDD was skipped in skillFeedback rather than attempting a synthetic failing test.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-hardening-2-test-port-helper-consolidation was a pure refactor (consolidating duplicated getTestPort helpers). Worker correctly skipped red-phase TDD and noted deviation in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges. The skill procedure (Work Procedure step 2) does not currently distinguish refactors from feature work.
